In the schedule of the above notification, the heading of column 2 may be read as “Goldhofer Serial No.” in place of “Chassis No.” and the heading of column 3 may be read as “Chassis No.” in place of -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] “Goldhofer Serial No.”. Further, the following two semi-trailers may be included in the list of semi-trailers of the schedule of the notification at Sl.No.32 and 33: Sl.No. Goldhofer Serial No. Chassis No. Unladen Weight Overall Length (Extended) 32. GH025 WGOSPZD34B0030764 15000 Kg. 45.450 Mtrs. 33. GH028 WGOSPZD3XB0030770 15000 Kg. 45.450 Mtrs. [No. RT-11042/21/2012-MVL] ABHAY DAMLE, Jt. Secy.
